message:
🐛 Fix GA4 engaged sessions always reporting 0 (#2054)

Two issues caused GA4 to report 0 engaged sessions despite 68-min
average session durations:

1. _et (engagement time) was consumed by every send() call, draining
   the accumulator before user_engagement events could capture it.
   Now only user_engagement events reset the accumulator; other events
   get a non-resetting peek.

2. seg=1 (session engaged flag) was set immediately on the 2nd event
   instead of after 10 seconds of active engagement (GA4 standard).
   Added ENGAGED_SESSION_THRESHOLD_MS with proper threshold check.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
